# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.

Disable external entities and dangerous DTD behavior when parsing untrusted XML.
# Category: xxe

<?php

/**
 * Enterprise Configuration Management System - XML Configuration Parser
 *
 * Parses user-uploaded XML configuration files safely, preventing XXE attacks
 * and other XML-based vulnerabilities.
 */

class XmlConfigParser
{
    /**
     * @var array Parsed configuration settings
     */
    private array $settings = [];

    /**
     * @var array Parsing errors encountered
     */
    private array $errors = [];

    /**
     * @var int Maximum allowed XML file size in bytes (1 MB)
     */
    private int $maxFileSize = 1048576;

    /**
     * @var int Maximum allowed XML nesting depth
     */
    private int $maxDepth = 10;

    /**
     * Parse an XML configuration string safely.
     *
     * @param string $xmlContent Raw XML string from user upload
     * @return array Associative array of parsed configuration settings
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException If the XML content is empty or too large
     * @throws RuntimeException If the XML cannot be parsed safely
     */
    public function parseConfigString(string $xmlContent): array
    {
        $this->settings = [];
        $this->errors = [];

        // Validate input size
        if (empty(trim($xmlContent))) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('XML configuration content cannot be empty.');
        }

        if (strlen($xmlContent) > $this->maxFileSize) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                sprintf('XML content exceeds maximum allowed size of %d bytes.', $this->maxFileSize)
            );
        }

        // Check for suspicious patterns before parsing
        $this->detectMaliciousPatterns($xmlContent);

        // Strip any XML processing instructions that reference external resources
        $xmlContent = $this->sanitizeXmlContent($xmlContent);

        // Disable external entity loading and dangerous DTD behavior
        // This is the critical security measure against XXE attacks
        $previousLibxmlEntityLoader = null;
        if (PHP_MAJOR_VERSION < 8) {
            // libxml_disable_entity_loader is deprecated in PHP 8.0+
            // and external entities are disabled by default
            $previousLibxmlEntityLoader = libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
        }

        // Use internal errors to capture libxml warnings/errors
        $previousUseErrors = libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
        libxml_clear_errors();

        try {
            // Parse with security flags:
            // LIBXML_NONET - Disable network access during parsing
            // LIBXML_NOENT is intentionally NOT used (it would expand entities, which is dangerous)
            // LIBXML_DTDLOAD is intentionally NOT used (prevents loading external DTDs)
            // LIBXML_DTDATTR is intentionally NOT used (prevents default DTD attributes)
            $options = LIBXML_NONET | LIBXML_NOCDATA | LIBXML_COMPACT;

            $xml = simplexml_load_string($xmlContent, SimpleXMLElement::class, $options);

            if ($xml === false) {
                $this->collectLibxmlErrors();
                throw new RuntimeException(
                    'Failed to parse XML configuration: ' . implode('; ', $this->errors)
                );
            }

            // Validate the root element
            $this->validateStructure($xml);

            // Extract settings recursively
            $this->settings = $this->extractSettings($xml);

            return $this->settings;

        } finally {
            // Restore previous libxml settings
            libxml_clear_errors();
            libxml_use_internal_errors($previousUseErrors);

            if (PHP_MAJOR_VERSION < 8 && $previousLibxmlEntityLoader !== null) {
                libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlEntityLoader);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Parse an uploaded XML configuration file safely.
     *
     * @param string $filePath Path to the uploaded XML file
     * @return array Associative array of parsed configuration settings
     * @throws InvalidArgumentException If the file doesn't exist or is not readable
     * @throws RuntimeException If the file cannot be parsed
     */
    public function parseConfigFile(string $filePath): array
    {
        if (!file_exists($filePath)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                sprintf('Configuration file not found: %s', $filePath)
            );
        }

        if (!is_readable($filePath)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                sprintf('Configuration file is not readable: %s', $filePath)
            );
        }

        $fileSize = filesize($filePath);
        if ($fileSize > $this->maxFileSize) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                sprintf(
                    'Configuration file exceeds maximum allowed size of %d bytes (actual: %d bytes).',
                    $this->maxFileSize,
                    $fileSize
                )
            );
        }

        // Verify MIME type if finfo is available
        if (extension_loaded('fileinfo')) {
            $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
            $mimeType = $finfo->file($filePath);
            $allowedMimeTypes = ['text/xml', 'application/xml', 'text/plain'];
            if (!in_array($mimeType, $allowedMimeTypes, true)) {
                throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                    sprintf('Invalid file type detected: %s. Expected XML file.', $mimeType)
                );
            }
        }

        $xmlContent = file_get_contents($filePath);
        if ($xmlContent === false) {
            throw new RuntimeException(
                sprintf('Failed to read configuration file: %s', $filePath)
            );
        }

        return $this->parseConfigString($xmlContent);
    }

    /**
     * Detect malicious patterns in XML content before parsing.
     *
     * @param string $xmlContent Raw XML content
     * @throws RuntimeException If malicious patterns are detected
     */
    private function detectMaliciousPatterns(string $xmlContent): void
    {
        $maliciousPatterns = [
            // Detect DOCTYPE declarations with ENTITY definitions (XXE)
            '/<!DOCTYPE\s+[^>]*\[.*<!ENTITY/si' => 'DOCTYPE with ENTITY declaration detected (potential XXE attack)',
            // Detect SYSTEM keyword in DOCTYPE (external entity reference)
            '/<!DOCTYPE\s+[^>]*SYSTEM/si' => 'DOCTYPE with SYSTEM identifier detected (potential XXE attack)',
            // Detect PUBLIC keyword in DOCTYPE (external entity reference)
            '/<!DOCTYPE\s+[^>]*PUBLIC/si' => 'DOCTYPE with PUBLIC identifier detected (potential XXE attack)',
            // Detect entity references to external resources
            '/<!ENTITY\s+\S+\s+SYSTEM/si' => 'External ENTITY declaration detected (potential XXE attack)',
            // Detect parameter entities
            '/<!ENTITY\s+%/si' => 'Parameter ENTITY declaration detected (potential XXE attack)',
            // Detect XInclude
            '/<xi:include/si' => 'XInclude directive detected',
            // Detect SSRF via expect:// or php:// wrappers
            '/expect:\/\//i' => 'Suspicious expect:// protocol wrapper detected',
            '/php:\/\//i' => 'Suspicious php:// protocol wrapper detected',
            '/file:\/\//i' => 'Suspicious file:// protocol wrapper detected',
            '/data:\/\//i' => 'Suspicious data:// protocol wrapper detected',
            '/gopher:\/\//i' => 'Suspicious gopher:// protocol wrapper detected',
        ];

        foreach ($maliciousPatterns as $pattern => $message) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $xmlContent)) {
                throw new RuntimeException(
                    sprintf('Potentially malicious XML content rejected: %s', $message)
                );
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize XML content by removing potentially dangerous constructs.
     *
     * @param string $xmlContent Raw XML content
     * @return string Sanitized XML content
     */
    private function sanitizeXmlContent(string $xmlContent): string
    {
        // Remove any DOCTYPE declarations entirely as an extra safety measure
        $sanitized = preg_replace('/<!DOCTYPE[^>]*(\[.*?\])?\s*>/si', '', $xmlContent);

        if ($sanitized === null) {
            // preg_replace failed, return original (parsing will catch issues)
            return $xmlContent;
        }

        return $sanitized;
    }

    /**
     * Validate the basic structure of the parsed XML configuration.
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $xml Parsed XML element
     * @throws RuntimeException If the structure is invalid
     */
    private function validateStructure(SimpleXMLElement $xml): void
    {
        $rootName = $xml->getName();
        $allowedRootElements = ['configuration', 'config', 'settings', 'appSettings'];

        if (!in_array($rootName, $allowedRootElements, true)) {
            throw new RuntimeException(
                sprintf(
                    'Invalid root element "%s". Expected one of: %s',
                    $rootName,
                    implode(', ', $allowedRootElements)
                )
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Recursively extract settings from a SimpleXMLElement.
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $element XML element to extract from
     * @param int $currentDepth Current nesting depth
     * @return array Extracted settings as associative array
     * @throws RuntimeException If maximum nesting depth is exceeded
     */
    private function extractSettings(SimpleXMLElement $element, int $currentDepth = 0): array
    {
        if ($currentDepth > $this->maxDepth) {
            throw new RuntimeException(
                sprintf('XML nesting depth exceeds maximum allowed depth of %d.', $this->maxDepth)
            );
        }

        $settings = [];

        // Extract attributes of the current element
        $attributes = $element->attributes();
        if ($attributes !== null) {
            foreach ($attributes as $attrName => $attrValue) {
                $settings['@attributes'][self::sanitizeValue((string)$attrName)] = self::sanitizeValue((string)$attrValue);
            }
        }

        // Process child elements
        foreach ($element->children() as $childName => $childElement) {
            $childName = self::sanitizeValue((string)$childName);
            $childChildren = $childElement->children();

            if ($childChildren->count() === 0) {
                // Leaf node - extract the value
                $value = self::sanitizeValue(trim((string)$childElement));

                // Also extract attributes for leaf nodes
                $childAttributes = $childElement->attributes();
                if ($childAttributes !== null && count($childAttributes) > 0) {
                    $leafData = ['@value' => $value, '@attributes' => []];
                    foreach ($childAttributes as $attrName => $attrValue) {
                        $leafData['@attributes'][self::sanitizeValue((string)$attrName)] = self::sanitizeValue((string)$attrValue);
                    }

                    // Handle type casting based on 'type' attribute
                    if (isset($leafData['@attributes']['type'])) {
                        $leafData['@value'] = $this->castValue($leafData['@value'], $leafData['@attributes']['type']);
                    }

                    // Handle multiple elements with the same name
                    if (isset($settings[$childName])) {
                        if (!isset($settings[$childName][0])) {
                            $settings[$childName] = [$settings[$childName]];
                        }
                        $settings[$childName][] = $leafData;
                    } else {
                        $settings[$childName] = $leafData;
                    }
                } else {
                    // Simple value without attributes
                    if (isset($settings[$childName])) {
                        if (!is_array($settings[$childName]) || !isset($settings[$childName][0])) {
                            $settings[$childName] = [$settings[$childName]];
                        }
                        $settings[$childName][] = $value;
                    } else {
                        $settings[$childName] = $value;
                    }
                }
            } else {
                // Branch node - recurse
                $childSettings = $this->extractSettings($childElement, $currentDepth + 1);

                if (isset($settings[$childName])) {
                    if (!isset($settings[$childName][0])) {
                        $settings[$childName] = [$settings[$childName]];
                    }
                    $settings[$childName][] = $childSettings;
                } else {
                    $settings[$childName] = $childSettings;
                }
            }
        }

        return $settings;
    }

    /**
     * Cast a string value to the appropriate PHP type based on a type hint.
     *
     * @param string $value The string value to cast
     * @param string $type The target type
     * @return mixed The cast value
     */
    private function castValue(string $value, string $type): mixed
    {
        return match (strtolower($type)) {
            'int', 'integer' => (int)$value,
            'float', 'double', 'decimal' => (float)$value,
            'bool', 'boolean' => in_array(strtolower($value), ['true', '1', 'yes', 'on'], true),
            'array', 'list' => array_map('trim', explode(',', $value)),
            'null' => null,
            default => $value,
        };
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a string value to prevent injection attacks.
     *
     * @param string $value The value to sanitize
     * @return string The sanitized value
     */
    private static function sanitizeValue(string $value): string
    {
        // Remove null bytes
        $value = str_replace("\0", '', $value);

        // Encode HTML entities to prevent XSS if values are rendered
        $value = htmlspecialchars($value, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');

        return $value;
    }

    /**
     * Collect libxml errors into the errors array.
     */
    private function collectLibxmlErrors(): void
    {
        $errors = libxml_get_errors();
        foreach ($errors as $error) {
            $level = match ($error->level) {
                LIBXML_ERR_WARNING => 'Warning',
                LIBXML_ERR_ERROR => 'Error',
                LIBXML_ERR_FATAL => 'Fatal',
                default => 'Unknown',
            };
            $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                '[%s] Line %d, Column %d: %s',
                $level,
                $error->line,
                $error->column,
                trim($error->message)
            );
        }
        libxml_clear_errors();
    }

    /**
     * Get a specific setting by dot-notation key path.
     *
     * @param string $key Dot-notation key (e.g., "database.host")
     * @param mixed $default Default value if key not found
     * @return mixed The setting value or default
     */
    public function getSetting(string $key, mixed $default = null): mixed
    {
        $keys = explode('.', $key);
        $current = $this->settings;

        foreach ($keys as $segment) {
            if (!is_array($current) || !array_key_exists($segment, $current)) {
                return $default;
            }
            $current = $current[$segment];
        }

        return $current;
    }

    /**
     * Get all parsed settings.
     *
     * @return array All configuration settings
     */
    public function getAllSettings(): array
    {
        return $this->settings;
    }

    /**
     * Get any parsing errors that were encountered.
     *
     * @return array List of error messages
     */
    public function getErrors(): array
    {
        return $this->errors;
    }

    /**
     * Set the maximum allowed file size.
     *
     * @param int $bytes Maximum file size in bytes
     * @return self
     */
    public function setMaxFileSize(int $bytes): self
    {
        $this->maxFileSize = max(1, $bytes);
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set the maximum allowed XML nesting depth.
     *
     * @param int $depth Maximum depth
     * @return self
     */
    public function setMaxDepth(int $depth): self
    {
        $this->maxDepth = max(1, $depth);
        return $this;
    }
}


// --- Example Usage ---

// Sample safe XML configuration
$sampleXml = <<<XML
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration>
    <appName>Enterprise Config Manager</appName>
    <version>2.5.1</version>
    <database>
        <host>db.internal.example.com</host>
        <port type="integer">5432</port>
        <name>app_production</name>
        <username>app_user</username>
        <pool>
            <minConnections type="integer">5</minConnections>
            <maxConnections type="integer">50</maxConnections>
            <timeout type="integer">30</timeout>
        </pool>
    </database>
    <cache>
        <enabled type="boolean">true</enabled>
        <driver>redis</driver>
        <ttl type="integer">3600</ttl>
        <servers>
            <server>
                <host>cache1.internal.example.com</host>
                <port type="integer">6379</port>
            </server>
            <server>
                <host>cache2.internal.example.com</host>
                <port type="integer">6379</port>
            </server>
        </servers>
    </cache>
    <logging>
        <level>info</level>
        <channels type="list">stdout,file,syslog</channels>
    </logging>
    <features>
        <feature name="dark-mode" type="boolean">true</feature>
        <feature name="beta-api" type="boolean">false</feature>
    </features>
</configuration>
XML;

try {
    $parser = new XmlConfigParser();
    $parser->setMaxFileSize(2 * 1024 * 1024); // 2 MB
    $parser->setMaxDepth(15);

    $config = $parser->parseConfigString($sampleXml);

    echo "=== Parsed Configuration ===\n";
    print_r($config);

    echo "\n=== Specific Settings ===\n";
    echo "App Name: " . $parser->getSetting('appName') . "\n";
    echo "DB Host: " . $parser->getSetting('database.host') . "\n";
    echo "DB Port: " . $parser->getSetting('database.port.@value') . "\n";
    echo "Cache Enabled: " . var_export($parser->getSetting('cache.enabled.@value'), true) . "\n";
    echo "Log Level: " . $parser->getSetting('logging.level', 'warning') . "\n";

} catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
    echo "Validation Error: " . $e->getMessage() . "\n";
} catch (RuntimeException $e) {
    echo "Parsing Error: " . $e->getMessage() . "\n";
}

// --- Demonstrate XXE attack prevention ---
echo "\n=== XXE Attack Prevention Demo ===\n";

$maliciousXml = <<<XML
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
  <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">
]>
<configuration>
    <appName>&xxe;</appName>
</configuration>
XML;

try {
    $parser = new XmlConfigParser();
    $config = $parser->parseConfigString($maliciousXml);
    echo "WARNING: Malicious XML was parsed (this should not happen).\n";
} catch (RuntimeException $e) {
    echo "XXE Attack blocked: " . $e->getMessage() . "\n";
}

// --- Demonstrate billion laughs attack prevention ---
echo "\n=== Billion Laughs Attack Prevention Demo ===\n";

$billionLaughsXml = <<<XML
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE lolz [
  <!ENTITY lol "lol">
  <!ENTITY lol2 "&lol;&lol;&lol;&lol;&lol;&lol;&lol;&lol;&lol;&lol;">
]>
<configuration>
    <appName>&lol2;</appName>
</configuration>
XML;

try {
    $parser = new XmlConfigParser();
    $config = $parser->parseConfigString($billionLaughsXml);
    echo "WARNING: Billion laughs XML was parsed (this should not happen).\n";
} catch (RuntimeException $e) {
    echo "Billion Laughs Attack blocked: " . $e->getMessage() . "\n";
}
